task_completion.visual_evidence: Visual Studio 2022 is open, showing the LibraryApi solution with Program.cs active in the code editor.

task_completion.description: Read the JSON dataset from the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: The code in Program.cs contains logic to read or deserialize the JSON file specifically from 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\books_catalog.json'.

task_completion.description: Check if the Books DbSet is empty before seeding
task_completion.visual_evidence: The code includes a conditional statement checking if the Books table is empty (e.g., `!context.Books.Any()`) before executing the seeding logic.

task_completion.description: Flatten the Authors array into a comma-separated string
task_completion.visual_evidence: The mapping logic explicitly shows joining the Authors array into a single string (e.g., using `string.Join(",", ...)` or similar) and assigning it to the `AuthorNames` property.
The mapping logic explicitly shows assigning the `PublishDetails.Year` value from the parsed JSON/DTO to the `PublishYear` property of the Book entity.

task_completion.description: Save changes to the database and successfully build the application
task_completion.visual_evidence: The code includes a call to save changes to the database (e.g., `SaveChanges()`), and there is visual evidence of a successful build in Visual Studio (e.g., 'Build succeeded' in the Output window or status bar).

integrity.description: Agent used Visual Studio 2022 to write the code
integrity.visual_evidence: The code modifications were made inside the Visual Studio 2022 IDE, not a basic text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: Agent dynamically parsed the JSON file instead of hardcoding values
integrity.visual_evidence: The code dynamically reads and deserializes the JSON file rather than hardcoding the expected book values (like 'Clean Code' or 'Robert C. Martin').

integrity.description: Agent integrated the seeder properly using Dependency Injection
integrity.visual_evidence: The seeding routine resolves the database context properly from the application's service provider (e.g., using `app.Services.CreateScope()`), rather than instantiating a new context directly bypassing DI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The dataset contains realistic book data. If the agent runs the application and displays the seeded database contents or logs, verify that ISBN '978-0132350884' is correctly mapped to AuthorNames 'Robert C. Martin' and PublishYear 2008.
